rationale: The cited paper appears as part of a grouped parenthetical citation in a single literature-review sentence noting that few studies have examined payment-method moderation of the endowment effect. The citing paper does not discuss Novemsky and Kahneman (2005) in detail, does not rely on its specific propositions or design to build hypotheses, and does not use it for interpretation of results. Its functional role is therefore a brief background/example mention rather than a distinct argumentative foundation.
